title: Fix black background bleed above Exclusive Pre-Launch badge in Navigation

requirements.text: Fix the visual issue where a black background area bleeds into or overlaps the 'Exclusive Pre-Launch' badge/section in the Navigation component. Ensure the area directly above the Pre-Launch badge is visually clean and consistent with the surrounding navbar styling — no unwanted black blocks, gaps, or misaligned backgrounds should appear.

quotes: the black above is getting messed with exclusive pre launch

acceptanceCriteria: No unintended black background area appears above or around the 'Exclusive Pre-Launch' badge in the Navigation bar
The Navigation bar background renders consistently across the full width without color bleed or overlap artifacts
The Pre-Launch badge is fully visible with correct spacing and no surrounding visual glitches
The fix is consistent across desktop and mobile viewports

constraints: Do not alter the Navigation component's scroll behavior or the 'Connect With Us' smooth-scroll functionality
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/
nonGoals: Redesigning the Navigation layout or badge style
Adding new navigation items or sections
